title: Vignea tenuiflora
intro: Vignea tenuiflora, also known as Piptadenia gonoacantha, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, depression, and insomnia, due to its reported sedative and anxiolytic effects. The bioactive constituents of Vignea tenuiflora include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Vignea tenuiflora is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of ailments, and it is also used in the form of capsules and tablets.
